creator: koitsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The problem appears to be specific to courier-imap and drac; I 
understand that -DREQ_HASH is needed for exim to be able to properly 
read the values in dracd.db, but the segfault has nothing to do with 
exim.  Regardless, I attempted to reproduce this problem over the past 
few hours (installing RELENG_7, exim-mysql, courier-imap with drac 
support, and drac built with WITH_EXIM=yes), but cannot.  If this 
problem still exists, please let me know, although I can't repro it.
